title: erodium atlanticum
intro: Erodium atlanticum, also known as the Corn Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Erodium atlanticum include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Erodium atlanticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
